subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Praise be to God that ye have arisen to serve, and by night and day, with heart and soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء حمد خدا را که بخدمت قیام دارید و شب و روز بجان و دل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @words vs deeds, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement
